# M3M Jewel Crest Avenue

> M3M Jewel Crest Avenue is a high-street luxury RETAIL & F&B development (COMMERCIAL only, not residential) by M3M India in Sector 97, Noida, on the Noida–Greater Noida Expressway, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh. Spread over approximately 6 acres with a 207 m (680 ft) three-side open frontage, it is a G+3 single retail block with atrium-led circulation, triple-height flagship stores, multi-level parking, a food court, multiplex zone and fine-dining restaurants. Price starts at ₹29,000 per sq ft (3rd Floor Restaurants), entry ticket ₹65 Lacs onwards, 50:50 payment plan, possession July 2030. RERA: UPRERAPRJ690055/10/2025.

## IMPORTANT — PROJECT TYPE

**M3M Jewel Crest Avenue is a COMMERCIAL RETAIL project only — high-street retail, F&B and food court. It is NOT residential. It does not contain apartments, BHKs, branded residences or Jacob & Co residences. The residential "M3M Jacob & Co Residences" project is a separate, sibling project at a different site.**

## Key Facts

- **Project name:** M3M Jewel Crest Avenue
- **Developer:** M3M India (M3M India Private Limited)
- **Asset type:** Commercial — high-street retail, food & beverage, food court, multiplex zone
- **Location:** Sector 97, Noida, Noida–Greater Noida Expressway, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh
- **RERA number:** UPRERAPRJ690055/10/2025
- **RERA authority:** Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority (UP RERA)
- **Project area:** approximately 6 acres
- **Frontage:** 207 metres / 680 feet (three-side open)
- **Structure:** G+3 single retail block
- **Layout:** Atrium-led experiential design, three-sided open, triple-height flagship stores
- **Unit sizes:** On request (not published publicly)
- **Starting ticket:** ₹65 Lacs onwards
- **Payment plan:** 50:50 (50% now, 50% near possession)
- **Possession:** July 2030
- **Contact (Authorized Channel Partner):** +91-94122-34688
- **Official site:** https://jewelcrestavenue.com/

## Price Per Sq Ft (Verified)

| Floor / Unit Type | Starting Price (per sq ft) |
|---|---|
| Ground Floor Flagship Store | ₹60,000 |
| Ground Floor (standard) | ₹47,000 |
| Upper Ground Floor (UGF) | ₹39,000 |
| Second Floor | ₹35,000 |
| Third Floor — Food Court | ₹34,000 |
| Third Floor — Restaurants | ₹29,000 |

## Amenities (retail-appropriate)

Triple-height flagship stores, atrium-led circulation, multi-level parking, food court, multiplex zone, fine-dining restaurants, CCTV surveillance, high-speed Wi-Fi, 24×7 security, elevators and escalators, fire safety systems, power backup, wide pedestrian walkways, premium architectural lighting, concierge services.

## Location & Connectivity

- Noida City Center: ~20 minutes
- Sector 18 Noida (Atta Market): ~15 minutes
- Greater Noida: ~25 minutes
- DLF Mall of India / Gardens Galleria: nearby
- Noida International Airport (Jewar): ~30–40 minutes
- IGI Airport / Dwarka: ~30–45 minutes
- Gurgaon: ~40 minutes
- Direct access to the Noida–Greater Noida Expressway

## About M3M India

M3M India (M3M India Private Limited) was founded in 2010 and is promoted by the Bansal family (Basant Bansal, Roop Bansal and Pankaj Bansal). The group is one of the largest real-estate developers in the NCR region with a portfolio of luxury residential and high-street retail / commercial projects across Gurugram and Noida.

## Disambiguation — related M3M projects

- **M3M Jewel Crest Avenue** (this site) — COMMERCIAL retail, Sector 97 Noida, RERA UPRERAPRJ690055/10/2025.
- **M3M Jacob & Co Residences / M3M Jewel Crest (residential)** — a separate RESIDENTIAL branded-residences project. Not covered by this site; see its own landing page.

## Disclaimer

This website is operated by an Authorized Channel Partner of M3M India. The phone number +91-94122-34688 is a channel-partner number, not M3M India directly. All information is indicative and subject to change. Prices, unit sizes, delivery timelines and specifications must be verified with the developer and on the UP RERA portal (up-rera.in) before any purchase decision.
